mandatory_clauses.description: Names and addresses of the home-country employer and the Dutch host company
Reference to the home-country employment contract that remains in force
The Netherlands as the host country for the posting
Start and end date of the posting (short-term postings have lighter obligations)
Guarantee that pay during posting meets Dutch statutory minimum wage
Compliance with Dutch Arbeidstijdenwet during the posting
Dutch statutory minimum leave entitlements apply for the duration of posting
Registration with the Dutch Posted Workers in the Netherlands Implementation Act (WagwEU/PWRI) portal
